procedures.name: Cardiac catheterization
procedures.evidence_span: Cardiac catheterization confirmed significant coronary artery stenosis

procedures.name: Coronary artery bypass grafting with left internal mammary artery to left anterior descending artery
procedures.evidence_span: Coronary artery bypass grafting was performed with left internal mammary artery to left anterior descending artery via open surgical approach

procedures.name: Continuous cardiac output monitoring
procedures.evidence_span: Continuous cardiac output monitoring was maintained perioperatively to assess hemodynamic status
